Rated voltage(kV) 12 3.6 1.1 - Basic Impulse level (kVp) 75 40 -- - Wet, dry power withstand voltage(kV) 28 10 3 - Minimum creepage distance (mm) As per relevant IEC/ IS - Mounting (mm) Tank / Transformer body Standard Technical Specification for Sub- critical Thermal Power Project - 2x(500MW or above) Main Plant Package Section-5 (Electrical Works) 5 - 51 o) Terminal details - High Voltage (3.3kV and11 kV) Busduct/ Cable - 433V phase and neutral Busduct/ Cable box However, non-segregated busduct for transformers rated 1000 KVA and above shall be provided. iii) Temperature rise over an ambient of 50 oC a) Out-door transformers : In top oil (measured by thermometer): 50 oC In winding (measured by resistance): 55 oC b) In-door transformers : In winding (by resistance method) 90 0C or lower as permissible for class of insulation offered iv) Class of insulation F or better (for dry type transformers) A or better (for oil filled transformers) v) Noise level at rated voltage As per NEMA Pub TR-1 and frequency 5.6.3 Neutral Grounding Resistor i) Resistance (ohm) As per requirements ii) Rated current and dur ation 300A for 10 seconds iii) Application Grounding of 11kV and 3.3 kV system
